title: Administrative Burdens and Child Medicaid Enrollments
notes: EVENT STUDY REVIEWED — Dataset reconstructed from Census API (tidycensus B01001 under-19 approx + S1701 poverty) + CMS enrollment + KFF policy data. ACS.dta (IPUMS) not redistributable; pop/totpop/pov from Census published tables. TWFE gap 6% (-0.0182 vs -0.0172) due to IPUMS perwt sums vs Census table estimates. N=4085 vs 4086 (match). Interpolation: approx(rule=1) matches Stata ipolate (no extrapolation). Paper uses aggte(type='simple'); our protocol uses aggte(type='dynamic'). 15 treated states, 12 distinct treatment cohorts, ~35 never-treated.
